description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent red gable roof and white exterior walls. The front facade includes a covered porch with steps leading up to the main entrance, flanked by large windows that allow ample natural light. The side elevations reveal additional windows and a small extension, possibly a utility or storage area, attached to the main building. The property sits on a rectangular green lawn with a paved walkway leading to the front door. The roof has skylights or dormer windows, adding architectural interest and likely providing extra light to the interior. The overall design is compact and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story white bungalow with a red gable roof, covered front porch, and large windows, set on a green lawn with a paved walkway.
description_view_0: Side and front view showing the gable roof, covered porch, and main entrance with steps.
description_view_1: Direct front and rear view highlighting the porch, large front windows, and the plain rear facade.
description_view_2: Opposite side and rear view displaying the roof extension, side windows, and the back of the house.
description_view_3: Rear and front view emphasizing the symmetry of the roof and the arrangement of windows and doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side windows
